endpoint.description: Huayulab NGAF API base URL, for example https://ngaf.example:9091/api.php.

lan.description: Language header sent to Huayulab NGAF APIs.

skipTlsVerify.description: Skip TLS verification for lab appliances with self-signed certificates.

allowInsecureHttp.description: Allow http:// endpoints. Keep false outside isolated lab validation.
